status_summary: Field Desk is the current public/admin control-center host for NYCIF Master Admin, Event Sources snapshots, and XRI admin/status surfaces. This status artifact is static and public-safe.

blockers: Master dashboard still uses a manually curated status snapshot until every NYCIF repo publishes its own status artifact.
Private repos must only publish public-safe summaries; no private internals or operational details should be copied into the master dashboard.
next_action: Create equivalent public-safe status artifacts for the remaining six NYCIF repos, then update the Master Projects dashboard to consume static repo status artifacts.

data_freshness.notes: This file is a static artifact. It does not poll GitHub from the browser. PR states should be refreshed by future controlled updates.
